components.description: V0_6 fast-finality BFT consensus: phase-1/2 votes, quorum and timeout certificates, view changes, epoch transitions, and cutover seeding that hands over from the legacy stack at the decided upgrade boundary.
headlineProperties: Agreement: no two conflicting leaves are ever decided at the same view
A quorum certificate forms only from votes carrying more than two-thirds of stake
Committed blocks are never reverted; each view decides at most one block
Cutover: the new protocol's decided chain extends the legacy-decided chain across the upgrade boundary with no gaps
Liveness: under an honest quorum, views make progress and blocks are eventually decided
components.name: New Protocol (Fast Finality)
components.specHints: Consensus state machine in consensus.rs (Consensus::apply_pre_cutover_seed, vote/QC/timeout/view-change handling); coordinator/ schedules views and timers; cutover.rs seeds handover from the legacy stack at the decided upgrade boundary; epoch.rs handles epoch transitions; proposal.rs/vote.rs/message.rs define proposals, votes and wire messages; outbox.rs emits messages over the cliquenet transport; storage.rs persists decided actions. Model votes/certificates/views/epochs over an abstract message transport rather than modeling cliquenet's encryption.
